staged_emails.subject: A note from Clarion
staged_emails.body:
Hi there,

I noticed Texas Injury Advocates has accumulated over 150 client reviews - an impressive volume that also creates a visibility challenge. With that many reviews coming in, important client feedback patterns often only surface after they've affected multiple cases.

Clarion converts your public reviews into a weekly governance brief that surfaces these patterns systematically - giving partners clear visibility into recurring themes before they become trends.

I'd be glad to show you how it works using a sample of your actual reviews. Would you have 20 minutes this week?

Best,
James
